text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yup, no doubt about it. The best<n>Umamusume are
the cool ones!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What nonsense. Obviously cutenesstrumps coolness any day of the week!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What about that movie? "Three Furlongs<n>of the
Heart," right? You were going on<n>and on about
how cool the male lead<n>was!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, what about you?! You said theheroine was so cute, you just had tocheer her on!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...You know what, let's just leave it at<n>that.
